data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation, including the capture of customer signatures and photos. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation of these functionalities, such as API reads or persisted state checks. The linked use case outlines the need for these features, but without specific evidence, the validation cannot be concluded.
gaps: No evidence of signature capture functionality.
No evidence of photo documentation linked to signatures.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for signature capture functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the signature capture requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for photo documentation linkage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the linkage of photo documentation to signatures.
